speaker: Nina
line: Okay, Tina, everyone's raving about Flins in Genshin Impact.

speaker: Nina
line: Is he really all that?

speaker: Tina
line: Right? He's a total powerhouse.

speaker: Tina
line: On paper, he looks amazing.

speaker: Nina
line: But then I see all these guides saying he needs Ineffa or C1.

speaker: Nina
line: What's the deal with that?

speaker: Nina
line: Is he actually good, or just 'good if'?

speaker: Tina
line: Ah, the classic Genshin conundrum!

speaker: Tina
line: Flins is like a gourmet chef.

speaker: Tina
line: He can cook up incredible dishes.

speaker: Tina
line: But he needs the perfect kitchen setup.

speaker: Tina
line: And maybe a sous-chef, like Ineffa.

speaker: Nina
line: So he's not a chef who can just whip something up anywhere?

speaker: Nina
line: He needs a five-star kitchen and a personal assistant?

speaker: Nina
line: That sounds… high maintenance.

speaker: Tina
line: Exactly! Without Ineffa or his C1,

speaker: Tina
line: he's still good, but maybe more like a really fancy microwave meal.

speaker: Tina
line: Still edible, but not Michelin-star worthy.

speaker: Nina
line: So if I don't have Ineffa, or I can't get his C1,

speaker: Nina
line: I'm basically just heating up leftovers?

speaker: Nina
line: That's not the 'GREAT' I was promised!

speaker: Tina
line: Well, the 'GREAT' is contingent.

speaker: Tina
line: It's like buying a sports car.

speaker: Tina
line: It's GREAT, but you need premium fuel.

speaker: Tina
line: And maybe a race track to truly appreciate it.

speaker: Nina
line: Premium fuel and a race track.

speaker: Nina
line: So my little Honda Civic setup isn't gonna cut it?

speaker: Nina
line: This game always makes me feel poor.

speaker: Tina
line: Not quite! You can still enjoy the drive.

speaker: Tina
line: But to break speed records, you need the full package.

speaker: Tina
line: It's about maximizing potential.

speaker: Nina
line: So, if I just want to clear some domains,

speaker: Nina
line: he'll be fine, but he won't be breaking any damage records?

speaker: Nina
line: Just... okay?

speaker: Tina
line: Pretty much! He'll do his job.

speaker: Tina
line: But to see those big numbers everyone's bragging about,

speaker: Tina
line: you gotta invest in his support system.

speaker: Nina
line: Ugh. Another character to farm for.

speaker: Nina
line: My resin is already crying.

speaker: Tina
line: Welcome to Genshin Impact, my friend!

speaker: Tina
line: It's a marathon, not a sprint.

speaker: Tina
line: Or, in Flins' case, a very specific relay race.

speaker: Nina
line: A specific relay race where I'm always dropping the baton.

speaker: Nina
line: Thanks for clarifying, Tina!

speaker: Tina
line: Anytime, Nina! Happy gacha-ing!
